project.name: TinniMate
project.description: App hỗ trợ người bị ù tai (tinnitus) — AI chat, liệu pháp âm thanh, theo dõi tiến độ. Platform: Web + Mobile (iOS/Android).
project.domain: tinnitus therapy, mental health, audio therapy

web.auth: Supabase Auth (session cookie, NO X-User-ID header trust)

mobile.expo_server: npx expo start --tunnel từ mobile/ (không phải root)

video.output: TikTok/Social videos (50 HTML templates + batch scripts)

infra.redis: Upstash (optional — app works without it via fallback)

security.auth_pattern: Always use supabase.auth.getUser() server-side. Never trust client headers (X-User-ID removed)
security.idor_fix: All API routes verify resource ownership (conversations.user_id === user.id) before write
security.guest_rate_limit: IP-based, 2 messages/24h, via lib/rate-limit.ts (Upstash or in-memory)
security.stripe_idempotency: stripe_events table (PK: event.id) — duplicate events → 200 skip
security.middleware_matcher: Explicit route list in lib/supabase/middleware.ts. sitemap.xml and robots.txt excluded from middleware.

database_schema.summary: Supabase PostgreSQL. RLS enabled on all user tables. Service role (bypass RLS) used in API routes.

key_tables.name: fb_pages
key_tables.note: Fanpage accounts — Playwright session cookie stored

key_tables.name: fb_target_sources
key_tables.note: Sources to scrape. page_id FK added migration 000003

key_tables.name: fb_replies
key_tables.note: comment_id FK added 2026-04-22: NULL=post reply, NOT NULL=comment reply

database_schema.critical_gotcha: assessments table uses 'score' and 'interpretation' — NOT 'total_score' or 'severity'. API supports both for backward compat.

features.name: AI Chat (Tinni)
features.description: AI chatbot hỗ trợ người bị ù tai, dùng Gemini model, có tool calling, chat suggestions, guest mode (2 msgs free)
features.sse_parser: lib/ai/gemini.ts — TextDecoder({stream:true}) + buffer accumulator for chunked JSON

features.name: Sound Mixer
features.description: Mix 11 sounds: white/pink/brown noise, rain, ocean, forest, campfire, birds, river, wind, singing bowl. Tier-gated.

features.name: Assessments (THI/TFI/PHQ-9/GAD-7/ISI)
features.description: Đánh giá mức độ ù tai và sức khoẻ tâm thần

features.name: Chat Suggestions
features.description: Context-aware gợi ý chủ đề dựa trên lịch sử assessment, daily checkin (VN timezone UTC+7)

features.name: Journal
features.description: Nhật ký cảm xúc + mức độ ù tai hàng ngày

features.name: Stripe Subscription
features.description: Checkout, webhook xử lý tier update, idempotency via stripe_events table

features.name: SEO
features.description: sitemap.ts + robots.ts. robots.txt OK (200). sitemap.xml có issue với Next.js 16 middleware (investigate later).
features.todo: sitemap.xml 404 — Next.js 16 deprecated middleware.ts→proxy.ts, may affect dynamic routes

features.name: Social Listening — Comment Reply Pipeline
features.description: Scrape Facebook groups → extract posts → scrape comments → LLM classify (needs_reply) → generate draft → admin review → Playwright post reply as Fanpage
features.pipeline: fb_target_sources → scrape-consumer (BullMQ fb-scrape) → fb_posts + fb_comments → classify-comment-job (BullMQ fb-comment-classify, 3x) → fb_replies(comment_id) → admin Comment Inbox → post-fb-comment.ts
key_files: worker/src/scraper/scrape-joined-groups.ts — scan groups page is logged in as Fanpage
worker/src/scraper/scrape-group-posts.ts — scroll group feed, keyword match
worker/src/scraper/scrape-post-comments.ts — scroll post, extract comments by permalink URL
worker/src/pipeline/classify-comment-job.ts — BullMQ consumer: classify + draft + upsert fb_replies
worker/src/db/fb-comments-upsert.ts — upsert helper + enqueue classify jobs
worker/src/browser/post-fb-comment.ts — Playwright post reply (detects comment_id → click Reply button)
critical_gotchas: Scan groups: must switch FB context to Fanpage before navigating — uses 'Chuyển ngay' button flow
Comment scraping: extract fb_comment_id from permalink URL (a[href*='/comment/']) NOT from DOM attributes
fb_replies.comment_id NULL = reply to post, NOT NULL = reply-to-comment
Post reply to comment: clickReplyButtonOnComment() clicks 'Trả lời' then types in the reply textarea
FB DOM selectors fragile — all selectors use heuristic chain with fallback
admin_pages: /admin/social-listening/comments — Comment Inbox: LLM-filtered comments needing reply

api_endpoints.explained: Main AI chat — SSE streaming, ownership check, IP rate limit
Gợi ý chủ đề dựa trên assessment + checkin hôm nay (UTC+7)
Lưu kết quả bài test (THI/TFI/PHQ-9/GAD-7/ISI). Field: score, interpretation
Webhook Stripe — có idempotency guard via stripe_events table
Trigger scrape job cho 1 source ngay lập tức
Approve & post reply (Playwright) cho fb_replies (post hoặc comment)
Worker → Web bridge: scan-groups, login, status etc.

phase_1_done: 7 screens implemented (Dashboard, Therapy, Pricing, Hearing Test, Progress, Profile, Chat)
phase_2_todo: Supabase Auth trong mobile (session persist AsyncStorage)
Data sync: daily_checkins, assessments, profiles tables
phase_4_todo: App Store submission (Android APK/AAB + iOS IPA)

known_issues.cause: Next.js 16 đổi middleware.ts → proxy.ts convention. Dynamic routes có thể bị affect.
known_issues.workaround: Tạo public/sitemap.xml tĩnh hoặc migrate sang proxy.ts

known_issues.issue: Next.js 16 warning: 'middleware file convention is deprecated, use proxy instead'
known_issues.cause: middleware.ts tên file cũ. Next.js 16 dùng proxy.ts
known_issues.workaround: Rename middleware.ts → proxy.ts và update matcher format
known_issues.priority: medium — cần làm trước next major release

conventions.mobile_store: ONLY use @/store/use-user-store. Legacy userStore.ts (có session + setSession) đã deprecated, chỉ giữ để tương thích nếu cần.
conventions.supabase_client: createClient() cho user-context, createServiceClient() để bypass RLS trong API routes
conventions.rate_limiting: Dùng lib/rate-limit.ts — auto-detect Upstash env, fallback in-memory
conventions.sse_streaming: Server: flush via WritableStream. Client: TextDecoder({stream:true}) + accumulate buffer
conventions.timezone: Daily checkins: filter theo VN timezone (UTC+7) — offset applied in SQL query

patterns: Ownership check pattern: query resource WHERE id=X AND user_id=authUser.id trước khi write
Stripe idempotency: INSERT stripe_events(id PK) → conflict code 23505 = already processed
Mobile store: use-user-store.ts exports useUserStore với { user, setUser, clearUser }
gotchas: assessments table: dùng 'score' và 'interpretation', KHÔNG phải total_score/severity
Next.js route groups (app) KHÔNG xuất hiện trong URL — middleware matcher phải dùng tên thật
.single() → .maybeSingle() nếu query có thể trả về 0 rows
Docker Dockerfile copy .next từ local — phải npm run build TRƯỚC rồi mới docker compose build
Ngrok v2.3.41 (bundled trong @expo/ngrok-bin) đã bị ngrok.com block — ERR_NGROK_121. Phải copy binary ngrok v3 vào node_modules/@expo/ngrok-bin-linux-x64/ngrok thủ công
npm install trong mobile/ sẽ restore ngrok binary v2 cũ — cần re-apply ngrok v3 binary sau mỗi npm install
Expo start phải chạy từ mobile/ subdirectory, KHÔNG phải tinnimate/ root (thiếu package.json)
Ngrok v3 config format: version:3 + agent.authtoken (không phải root authtoken như v2)
FB group scan: phải switch context sang Fanpage identity TRƯỚC khi navigate groups/joins — dùng 'Chuyển ngay' button
FB comment scraping: fb_comment_id extract từ href của <a> permalink (regex /comment/(\d+)/) — không trust DOM data attrs
BullMQ: geminiUsage.track() cần 3 args (inputTokens, outputTokens, tag) — thiếu tag sẽ type error
fb_replies.comment_id = NULL có nghĩa là reply cho bài viết (post), NOT NULL là reply cho comment cụ thể
